options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <hInst>+ # Specifies the hinst(s) to be ungrouped. ((hInst)+, optional)

options.name: -check_only
options.description: to check all constraints on specified hinsts to be ungroup. No actual ECO operation.

options.name: -escaped
options.description: Flattened names use escaped hinst names (h1/i1 becomes \h1/i1 in Verilog and h1\/i1 in DEF).

options.name: -exclude
options.description: Excludes specified hinst(s) as ungroup targets. ((hInst)+, optional)

options.name: -flatten
options.description: Ungroups recursively below the specified hinst(s)

options.name: -force
options.description: to ungroup all hierarchy, mapped or not, and override ungroup_allowed if set false.

options.name: -honor_dont_touch
options.description: to skips hinst that's marked as dont touch.

options.name: -only_user_hierarchy
options.description: to ungroup only user hierarchy, synthesized module will not be ungrouped.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Flattened names use a prefix (h1/i1 becomes <prefix>_i1).

options.name: -simple
options.description: Flattened names use the base_name (h1/i1 becomes i1).

options.name: -threshold
options.description: Ungroups only those hinsts that have an inst count less than or equal to the specified integer.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: to print the names of hinst being ungroup.
